textByHashes.c8750adb76ce12fc08dfeeb936cfb55ecc65a3e6: Ahoy, young whippersnapper. Have you come to hear a tale from old Ribs?
textByHashes.5b007bf878b18183d69c90a0377499a1774dc3fc: A dark day. A very dark day. Those young fools know not what they have wrought upon themselves.
textByHashes.815f23001faea6b3acb1b4f9477f246a7f5c75d7: A curse! A curse most foul! That map marked the resting place of the Crimson Kraken! She was a deadly vessel, captained by none other than Barnacle Barnaby himself!
textByHashes.acee80fd3064f0b343b51c56d91235aed558012f: You have not heard the tale of Barnacle Barnaby? You have not heard of the scourge of the Unquiet Ocean?
textByHashes.08bf4c799b1ec49422090487a9f15cb0d759f552: He was a cruel and vicious pirate. Orchestrator of the Driftwood Massacre and unleasher of the Plague of Black Mists. He believed himself untouchable, but his arrogance was his undoing.
textByHashes.28f4abdca20980207bf475140e63b26b2b40173f: Despite the warnings of many, Barnacle Barnaby attempted to plunder the Skullhorde, but his only reward was a deadly curse. It destroyed the Crimson Kraken, condemning all on board to a watery grave.
textByHashes.3a37e807e676bcbc858cab649df098dc31fbb0e8: Aye! I purchased the map from Ulrich the Unfortunate, the sole survivor of the Kraken, but I had no intention of using it. I knew that no good would ever come from seeking the Kraken.
textByHashes.2f2d4e79ac7a9e9e1a55ad69416983b5232d1d79: And risk the wrath of Barnaby's ghost? No. Better the map be locked away, so that neither it nor the curse could harm anyone else.
textByHashes.b82e1932fd341643c3a6695abdc0ceaba2fe0035: You are a fool for thinking that way, but on your head be it. The short of it is that Barnaby and the Kraken were cursed, condemning him and his crew to a watery grave.
textByHashes.76aa71612c68d69169971bf8363d0dc17dc80646: I feared as much, though part of me still hoped it would not come to be. Tell me, did they find Barnaby's medallion?
textByHashes.e65cf3a40657c0d37c3293e9a1826b28a90deb5b: Then the foul curse is now free once more. They must be stopped!
textByHashes.eb50818b976bc05d140223e7b03c2d2b089d54ef: You are a brave soul indeed, but that is just what is needed at a time like this.
textByHashes.fc2b4707b041164bd0625e15701fe4e73a6183d1: You should talk to Steve. He already put out a bounty for Will and Anne after the theft. He might have heard something about where they could have gone.
textByHashes.9f152b791b1ea438a815cbfe2f17e96331e93edd: Ahoy, young whippersnapper. Did you speak to Steve about that bounty?
textByHashes.e7f922823f82dd0e8f1dd093c928dcb28e530546: And risk the wrath of Barnaby's ghost? No. I thought it better the map be locked away, so that neither it nor the curse could harm anyone else, but those young fools put an end to that.
textByHashes.5e99c89d540853ae15c41aa08e3717a64e376796: Now we can only hope that someone puts a stop to them before it's too late. Who knows, perhaps it will be you who does so.
textByHashes.1440ebff03b33eb548fabb9ba1eb712db56831ea: As you wish, but you would be wise to learn from your elders. My tales might one day save you from a one-way trip to see Davey Jones!
